title: Lennox International, Inc. (LII) Soars to 52-Week High, Time to Cash Out?
text: Lennox (LII) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

title: Our Top 10 Dividend Growth Stocks - December 2023
text: We focus on selecting high-growth dividend stocks that have rapidly grown their dividends in the recent past rather than a high current yield. We use our proprietary models to rate quantitatively and qualitatively and select the top ten names from an initial list of nearly 400 dividend stocks. We provide criteria for selecting high-growth dividend stocks and offer a step-by-step guide on structuring a portfolio based on this strategy.

title: Building Materials Stocks Cluster Among New Highs
text: Building materials stocks have outperformed other groups with many stocks breaking out of bases and reaching new heights.

title: Lennox International, Inc. (LII) Hits Fresh High: Is There Still Room to Run?

title: Lennox Declares Quarterly Dividend and Announces Annual Meeting
text: DALLAS , Dec. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of Lennox (NYSE: LII) voted to declare a quarterly cash dividend of $1.10 per share of common stock. The dividend is payable on January 17, 2024, to stockholders of record as of December 29, 2023.

title: Are You Looking for a Top Momentum Pick? Why Lennox International (LII) is a Great Choice
text: Does Lennox International (LII) have what it takes to be a top stock pick for momentum investors? Let's find out.
